hero.positioning: Cyber & full-stack engineer — I build local, sovereign AI products, with zero cloud.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Local-first products, built end to end.

yui.pitch: 100% local AI voice assistant — controls the whole house, zero cloud. Wakeword + Whisper + XTTS, LLM agent, modular MCP architecture.
yui.architecture: Wakeword detection feeds Whisper (STT); an LLM agent plans actions over a modular MCP tool layer; XTTS handles speech synthesis. Everything runs locally.
features: Local LLM agent with tool use
Modular MCP architecture for home control
XTTS voice synthesis — no cloud calls

yoji.tagline: Local-first todos on top of Obsidian
yoji.pitch: Todo + Obsidian, open-source, fully local, Git-synced, serverless. Your data stays yours.
features: Lives on top of your Obsidian vault
